summary: Frontend additions implement an Internet Identity sign-in guard for the KD Dashboard and add an Admin “Add User” card wired through React Query. However, the diff summary does not provide evidence that the Motoko backend implements the required user seeding (fresh deployment non-zero) or an admin-only add-user canister method. The diff also includes multiple unrelated SEO/analytics/static-site additions not requested in the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Seed at least one user record on first initialization so `getTotalUsers()` returns >= 1 on a fresh deployment; seeding must be idempotent and must not modify existing users when the users map is non-empty.
missing_requirements.reason: No seeding logic is shown or described in the backend diff excerpt. The backend/main.mo snippet is truncated and contains no visible initialization/seed behavior for users or `getTotalUsers()` behavior on fresh deploy.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; no seeding shown in excerpt)

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend: provide an admin-only canister method to add a user record (name + email) and update total user count; non-admin callers cannot add users.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend adds `useAddUser()` and an AdminAddUserCard UI, but the diff summary does not show any corresponding Motoko canister method implementation or explicit admin-only enforcement on the backend.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; no add-user method shown in excerpt)
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts (mentions add user mutation in summary, but backend implementation not evidenced)

hallucinated_features.description: Added/modified multiple unrelated SEO + analytics features (GA4 tracking, Open Graph/Twitter meta tags, JSON-LD schema, enhanced event tracking) in the frontend HTML and public pages.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-8/9/10 and outside the stated scope (KD Platform user count seeding + admin add-user UI + dashboard auth prompt).
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (frontend/index.html: GA4 tracking, SEO meta tags, JSON-LD)
frontend-file-summaries.txt (frontend/public/press-release.html: Article schema markup + GA4 tracking/event monitoring)

hallucinated_features.description: Added Apache .htaccess configuration for WebP negotiation, caching, compression, MIME types.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-8/9/10 and unrelated to KD dashboard authentication/user management.

hallucinated_features.description: Added an OptimizedImage component and broad site-wide image optimization/lazy-loading/quality controls across multiple pages.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (frontend/src/components/OptimizedImage.tsx, and multiple pages referencing lazy-loaded optimized images)

hallucinated_features.description: Modified navigation/footer with UTM-tracked caffeine.ai attribution.
Introduced “📧 Official Email Contacts” sections with specific email addresses and an emoji in user-facing text.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-8/9/10; also conflicts with the constraint to use English for user-facing text (emoji usage may violate this intent).
